text.title: Architecture Workflows Decision Tree
text.summary: Routes by trigger category and review depth to a rule in 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: trigger maps to one of the 7 canonical workflows?

conclusion.verdict: abort; use SDD instead of inventing a custom workflow

branch.question: every type-1 step has review_gate=true + named reviewer?

conclusion.verdict: add review_gate + reviewer; block transition until set
block instantiation until abort_condition string present
run workflow; enforce artefact-on-disk gate per step
run workflow with role-per-step check; review gates optional

text.example: trigger_matches=true (atam-cbam) → decision_type=type-1 → review_gate_present=true → abort_declared=true → conclusion materialised-artefact → run workflow with disk gate.
